title: Correlation Heatmap — texture escape hatch
blurb: An N×N correlation matrix of the four symbols' return series, coloured cell-by-cell on a diverging blue↔red scale. Per-cell colour is beyond the instanced path, so the colormap is rasterized to an RGBA8 texture at manifest-build time and blitted onto a pane-covering quad via the texturedQuad@1 escape hatch.
